Files


file app_callbacks.h
Application-level callbacks for library code. file asciichat_errno.h
⚠️‼️ Comprehensive thread-local error context system for ascii-chat file atomic.h
⚛️ Atomic operations abstraction layer with debug tracking file buffer_pool.h
🗃️ Lock-Free Unified Memory Buffer Pool with Lazy Allocation file common.h
⚙️ Common definitions, error codes, macros, and types shared throughout the application file embedded_resources.h
Embedded resource management for production builds. file font.h
Font resolution and bundled font data. file paths.h
System paths configuration (generated by CMake). file ringbuffer.h
Lock-Free Ring Buffer and Frame Buffer Management. file thread_pool.h
🧵 Generic thread pool abstraction for managing worker threads file uthash.h
file version.h

Version 0.9.2 ascii-chat
